stories.title: Federal Reserve: Higher-for-longer stance maintained – Nordea
stories.summary: Nordea’s Sara Midtgaard reports that the Federal Reserve left its policy rate unchanged and signalled only gradual easing, with one 25 bp cut projected in both 2026 and 2027.

stories.title: US sends thousands of Marines and three warships to Middle East – WSJ
stories.summary: Citing officials, the Wall Street Journal reported on Friday that the Pentagon is sending roughly "2,200 to 2,500 Marines from the California-based USS Boxer amphibious ready group and 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit," to the Middle East, alongside three warships.

stories.title: Gold remains under pressure as global interest rate outlook weighs on demand
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) remains on the defensive on Friday following a sharp two-day decline that pushed prices to their lowest level since early February, near the $4,500 mark.

stories.title: Dollar strength returns on geopolitics – Scotiabank
stories.summary: Scotiabank’s global FX strategy team reports broad Dollar strength as G10 performance realigns with early US/Iran conflict patterns. They stress fragile risk sentiment as markets reassess prolonged conflict risks, central bank paths and violent yield repricing.

stories.title: USDCAD: Range holds as CAD outperforms – Scotiabank
stories.summary: Scotiabank’s Analyst Team notes the Canadian Dollar is modestly firmer versus the Dollar and leading G10 peers, echoing its earlier conflict-phase outperformance. They highlight narrowing yield spreads and a relatively muted Bank of Canada meeting as key drivers.

stories.title: EUR/GBP rises as markets assess ECB and BoE rate decisions, inflation outlook
stories.summary: EUR/GBP edges higher on Friday, recovering losses recorded in the previous day after the European Central Bank (ECB) and Bank of England (BoE) monetary policy announcements.

stories.title: Fed’s Waller: Do not think there is a need to consider rate hikes
stories.summary: Christopher Waller, a member of the Federal Reserve (Fed), said that based on the jobs report alone, he was planning to dissent in the monetary policy decision, but inflation has become more of a concern.

stories.title: USD/JPY rebounds as US Dollar strengthens, BoJ hawkishness tempers upside potential
stories.summary: USD/JPY trades around 158.70 on Friday at the time of writing, up 0.61% on the day, staging a clear rebound after Thursday’s sharp decline. The move comes as the US Dollar (USD) regains traction following a bout of volatility, with markets reassessing the outlook for US monetary

stories.title: Oil: Supply response tempers geopolitical spike – OCBC
stories.summary: OCBC’s Sim Moh Siong highlights that crude briefly surged toward USD120/bbl on Iranian attacks before easing as US officials signalled supply support and Israel suggested faster de-escalation.

stories.title: Gold: Near-term pressure versus structural support – OCBC
stories.summary: OCBC’s Christopher Wong reports that Gold has come under pressure as rising global yields and renewed inflation risks reduce expectations for near-term rate cuts, prompting ETF outflows and stress-driven liquidation.

stories.title: GBP/USD retreats as BoE hawkish shift meets resilient US Dollar
stories.summary: GBP/USD retreats on Friday, trading around 1.3380 at the time of writing, down 0.39% on the day, after Thursday’s strong rally following the Bank of England (BoE) decision.

stories.title: USD/INR surges above 94 as INR plummets amid consistent foreign outflows
stories.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its downfall against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday after a holiday the previous day.

stories.title: US Dollar: Upside risk persists in energy shock – BBH
stories.summary: Brown Brothers Harriman’s Elias Haddad notes that recent political comments briefly steadied risk sentiment, but renewed risk aversion has lifted the Dollar, Oil and bond yields while pressuring equities. With no key data due, focus is on Fed speakers.

stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD sets for third straight negative weekly close
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) trades in a tight range around $72.80 during the European trading session on Friday. The white metal holds onto Thursday’s recovery move, which was driven by weakness in the US Dollar (USD).

stories.title: ECB's Makhlouf: Don't think ECB has a tightening bias
stories.summary: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker and Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland Gabriel Makhlouf stated during European trading hours on Friday that the central bank doesn’t have a pre-determined rate path and the decision would be made meeting by meeting.

stories.title: EUR/USD: Conflict keeps downside risks in play – MUFG
stories.summary: According to MUFG’s Derek Halpenny, the ECB’s communication and achievement of its price stability goal leave it in a relatively better position than the BoE, but he is sceptical that higher front-end Euro yields will sustain Euro strength.

stories.title: Silver price today: Silver rises, according to FXStreet data
stories.summary: Silver prices (XAG/USD) rose on Friday, according to FXStreet data. Silver trades at $73.17 per troy ounce, up 0.45% from the $72.84 it cost on Thursday.

stories.title: Scope for Dollar to extend gains further – MUFG
stories.summary: MUFG’s Derek Halpenny notes that the recent retracement in Brent has eased immediate upward pressure on the Dollar, but he doubts the move will last given ongoing Middle East tensions and constrained supply.

stories.title: GBP/USD: BoE hawkish tilt underpins Pound – ING
stories.summary: ING’s Francesco Pesole notes that the Bank of England surprised markets with a unanimous hold and strong guidance that it is ready to act against any inflation spike. Markets added substantial tightening by year-end, though ING views this as too aggressive.

stories.title: Eurozone: ECB caution and hawkish risk – DBS
stories.summary: DBS Group Research economist Radhika Rao notes that the ECB kept rates unchanged but highlighted spillover risks from geopolitical tensions, with updated projections showing higher Eurozone inflation and weaker growth.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: BitFuFu cuts self-mined Bitcoin in 2025, shifts focus to cloud mining
stories.summary: Bitcoin miner BitFuFu decreased its revenue from self-hosted mining operations by 60% in 2025 in a push to cloud mining.

stories.title: Crypto part of Canada’s ‘core’ financial system, but risk concerns remain
stories.summary: The crypto industry has seen a number of regulatory changes over the past year, with the Canadian government taking a risk-management, rules-first approach.

stories.title: Bitcoin RSI eyes 2022 repeat as analysis suggests 'time to pay attention'
stories.summary: Bitcoin RSI signals approached a key moment as analysis said that a higher low was needed next to allow bullish BTC price continuation.

stories.title: Bitcoin whale holding $147M wakes after 13 years, makes tiny $56 transfer
stories.summary: A Bitcoin wallet inactive since 2012 has moved $56 worth of BTC, spotlighting a stash now valued at roughly $147 million after more than 13 years dormant.

stories.title: Stablecoin issuers and fintechs race to own payment rails
stories.summary: Leading crypto and fintech companies are competing to capture growing revenue from stablecoin payments by launching their own settlement infrastructure.

stories.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF
stories.summary: The proposed spot Bitcoin ETF outlines seed capital, listing plans and trading partners in its latest filing as it moves closer to a potential market debut.

stories.title: Coinbase launches 24/7 stock perps for non-US traders
stories.summary: Coinbase has launched stock perpetual futures for non-US traders, expanding its push to offer round-the-clock access to multiple asset classes.

stories.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
stories.summary: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.

stories.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
stories.summary: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.
